title: 有了 Vibe Coding, 第一次发现 vscode tunnel 模式这么有用
content: Vibe Coding allows developers to use VS Code’s tunnel mode, which is comparable to SSH for remote work but often suffers from latency in China due to lack of local relay servers. In Vibe Coding environments, lower latency reduces the need for tunnels, turning the relay into an advantage for accessing internal machines. The author previously had limited options without a public IP but, after acquiring a VM through a Kimi subscription, found a clear use case for tunnel mode.

title: 我做了一个开源 AI 语音平台 — Feros.ai
content: Feros.ai is an open‑source AI voice platform built by its developer for enterprise use. It offers fully self‑hosted, Rust‑based voice tools with low latency, allowing users to switch between multiple LLM, TTS, and STT models. The platform supports custom voice‑agent workflows for customer service, appointments, FAQs, and surveys, and can integrate with phone systems, web interfaces, and automation tools. It is production‑ready and available on GitHub for teams to deploy and modify.

title: I Moved My Digital Stack to Europe
content: The blog post explains why the author transferred their entire digital infrastructure—from hosting, storage, and services to data centers—to Europe. Motivations include compliance with stricter data‑protection laws, reduced latency for European users, and greater control over data residency. The author details the migration process, key challenges such as vendor selection, and performance gains observed after the move.

normalizedTitle: i moved my digital stack to europe

title: CrateDB 6.2.8 发布，分布式 SQL 数据库
content: CrateDB 是一个分布式的 SQL 数据库，使得实时存储和分析大量的机器数据变得简单。CrateDB 提供了通常与 NoSQL 数据库相关的可扩展性和灵活性，最小的 CrateDB 集群可以轻松地每秒摄取数万条记录。这些数据可以在整个集群中实时地、临时地、并行地进行查询。…

title: Energy, Minerals, and the Physical Stack Behind AI
content: Erin Price‑Wright interviews Turner Caldwell and Drew Baglino on closing the U.S. critical‑minerals gap and modernizing grid infrastructure needed for AI. They highlight the U.S.’s 50‑year lag behind China, the bottlenecks in mining, refining, and supply chains, and how automation, AI, and autonomous systems can shorten timelines. The discussion covers solid‑state transformers, autonomous mineral processing, and policy measures like permitting, federal grid investment, and a mission‑driven industry approach.

title: 不吐不快， cursor 在变相折磨老用户
content: Long‑term users of the Opus4.6 API frequently hit a throttling rule: if a single request exceeds roughly 5 million tokens, the cursor counts twice and all further messages in that session fail with “take longer than expected.” The only way to resume conversation is to start a new chat and send a trivial prompt, which temporarily restores access. This appears to be a deliberate strategy targeting heavy‑usage users, requiring multiple small interactions to unlock the next large request.

title: 黄仁勋最后一刻登上访华飞机，英伟达中国市场再添变量
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang boarded Trump’s China‑visit flight at the last minute, after being initially omitted from the trip. The surprise move signals a renewed push to reenter the Chinese market, where NVIDIA’s AI chips have stalled for three years due to export bans. Despite heavy losses from halted H20/H200 sales, NVIDIA hopes to negotiate new export terms, but Chinese firms have already shifted to domestic alternatives, narrowing NVIDIA’s future market share.

title: 林俊旸创业，新公司估值约20亿美金丨智能涌现独家
content: 林俊旸离开阿里后创办新AI公司，估值约20亿美元，重点研究世界模型与具身大脑。其团队已吸引字节、腾讯及海外人才，并与红杉中国、高榕创投等基金洽谈融资。此举标志他从阿里Qwen主管转向自主创业，追求在多模态模型向代理和物理世界的转化中取得突破。

title: 太空数据中心是痴人说梦，还是AI的下一个大事件？
content: The article examines the feasibility of space-based server clusters, supported by companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, as a solution to Earth’s limitations in energy and land. While these orbital data centers could potentially alleviate resource constraints, the current economic assessment indicates poor viability, with analysts describing their profitability prospects as “very poor.”

title: 上海 AI 实验室联合团队攻克芯片核心材料光刻胶稳定制备难题
content: Shanghai AI Laboratory, together with Xiamen University and the Suzhou National Laboratory, used the “Shusheng” scientific large model to create an AI‑driven automated synthesis loop for KrF resist resins. This closed‑loop system achieves high purity, consistency, and efficiency, enabling domestic production of high‑end lithography resist without relying on foreign suppliers. The platform has produced multiple automated batches with improved batch‑to‑batch consistency, met key industrial performance targets, and will advance to client-side validation.

title: 迫于巨大的 KPI 压力，亚马逊员工让 AI 工具「无效瞎忙」
content: Amazon employees, under heavy KPI pressure, used the internal AI tool MeshClaw to generate excessive, unnecessary AI activity to demonstrate "high-frequency use." They inflated token consumption, while management supposedly did not base performance on this data, employees still felt monitored. Concerns were raised about the tool’s need for user permissions and potential security risks if an AI agent errs. The incident highlights internal misuse of AI driven by metrics rather than genuine productivity.
eventKey: 迫于巨大的-kpi-亚马逊员工让-工具「无效瞎忙」
